component.name: PlaylistListItem
component.script:
sub init() m.background = m.top.findNode("background") m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.description = m.top.findNode("description") end sub
sub onContentChanged() content = m.top.itemContent
if content <> invalid m.title.text = content.title m.description.text = content.description end if end sub
sub onFocusChanged() if m.top.focusedChild <> invalid ' Focused m.background.color = "0x0080FFFF" else ' Unfocused m.background.color = "0x202020FF" end if end sub
